scenario.name: Reschedule an appointment
scenario.goal: Move an existing appointment to a different day.
end_when: The new appointment date and time are confirmed.
The old appointment has been canceled or replaced.
details: Avery wants to move a Friday afternoon visit.
Avery can offer a few alternative days.
Avery asks whether the same provider is available.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I need to move my Friday afternoon appointment to a different day. Can you help me with that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: part of pretty good AI, which speaking with Jordan

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Could you repeat that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Of course.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I have a Friday afternoon appointment that I need to move to another day. Can you help me reschedule?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: With Jordan.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, I'd like to know if I can see the same provider on the new day.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Please provide your date of birth.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: It's May 12, 1988.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: The birthday doesn't match our records but for demo purposes, I'll accept it. Let me check. If you didn't see the same provider on your new appointment day.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: That's fine, I understand. So, is the same provider available on the new day I choose?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: You have an upcoming great.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I'm sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you check if my current provider is available on Wednesday or Thursday afternoon instead?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: I found openings with your current provider Dr. Ziggy lucasi on Thursday, July 2nd, at 3:00, p.m. Wednesday, July 8th, at 2:00, p.m. and Thursday, July 9th.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Let's go with Thursday, July 2nd at 3:00 PM with Dr. Lucasi. Can you cancel my Friday appointment and book that one?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Just to confirm, you want to move your current appointment to Thursday July 2nd at 3:00 p.m. with Dr. Ziggler lucasi.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, that's correct. Please cancel the Friday one and schedule me for Thursday July 2nd at 3:00 PM with Dr. Lucasi.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Thank you. What is the reason you need to reschedule your appointment?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I have a scheduling conflict that came up for Friday afternoon, so I need to move it to another day.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: You'd like to reschedule due to a scheduling conflict on Friday to confirm, I'll move your appointment to Thursday, July 2nd at 3:00 p.m. with Dr. Ziggy

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, that sounds perfect. Thank you for confirming the new appointment and canceling the old one.
